metadata.description: Command-aware semantic compression of agent tool output via the PreToolUse command-wrap path on Codex.

plugins.name: semtrim
plugins.description: Replaces blind head+tail truncation with Boost-derived, command-aware compression. On Codex, compression runs through the reliable PreToolUse command-wrap path only (PostToolUse output replacement is unsupported on Codex); data-driven filters for npm/pnpm/pip/docker/go/cargo/tsc/next/vitest/jest/pytest/git/linters plus a generic fallback and secret redaction. Deterministic and cache-safe; never blocks.
